Local Package Caches

This pod provides local package caches for apt and pacman.

APT (apt-cacher-ng)

Cache path on host: $HOME/cache/apt

Acquire::http::Proxy "http://apt-cache.localhost:3142";
Acquire::https::Proxy "false";

Save that as /etc/apt/apt.conf.d/01proxy (or equivalent) on clients.

Pacman (pacoloco)

Cache path on host: $HOME/cache/pacman

[core]
Server = http://pacman-cache.localhost:9129/archlinux/$repo/os/$arch

[extra]
Server = http://pacman-cache.localhost:9129/archlinux/$repo/os/$arch

[multilib]
Server = http://pacman-cache.localhost:9129/archlinux/$repo/os/$arch

Add these entries at the top of /etc/pacman.conf.
